title: Verdant Verdure
description: Grassy Grass Blocks and Bushy Ferns
body:
# Verdant Verdure

Makes Grass Blocks and Ferns less flat with new Models

- **Grass Blocks** now have a **4/5 chance** to have **extra Grass** on top with varying lenght and position
- **Ferns** (large ferns and potted ferns too) now have a **more bushy look** closer to their real life look

⚠ **[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) Required** ⚠

![Grassy Super Flat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KJfBvEQ9/images/09fa220416e9f6fb427167f82eab30f2f3d94ab0.png)

![Ferns in a Taiga](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KJfBvEQ9/images/586169f65584d3966059428efa918bd0c5405302.png)

**More examples** in the [**Gallery**](https://modrinth.com/project/verdant-verdure/gallery)
